I just finished reading this book and let me tell you—it left a lot to be desired. The plot was predictable and the characters development felt forced. I thought for sure I would enjoy it, but nope. Anyone else out there struggling to find a good read lately?

Try "The Three-body Problem" by Liu Cixin—it grips you from the start and the universe views are mind-blowing!

Hey Harold, you might want to pick up "Dune" by Frank Herbert. Classic Sci-Fi but really immersive storyline. Worth giving a shot. 📚💕
